# Security policy

CipherLink handles encrypted note bodies and protected age identities. Please do not open a public issue for a suspected vulnerability or include real passwords, identities, ciphertext objects, gateway credentials, or private note content in a report.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting for this repository. Reproduce issues with synthetic data and include the affected CipherLink version, Obsidian version, platform, and the smallest safe reproduction steps.

The documented security boundary and known limitations are in [`docs/SECURITY.md`](../docs/SECURITY.md).
